markdown:
#  Approve or Reject a Change Order 
###### Which type of change order do you need to approve?
If you've been assigned as a 'Designated Reviewer' for a change order, click the appropriate link below to approve or reject it.
[Client Contract Change Order: 1](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-client-contract-change-orders)
[Commitment Change Order:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-commitment-change-orders)
[Funding Change Order: 2](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-funding-change-orders)
[Prime Contract Change Order:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-prime-contract-change-orders)
* * *
1 The Client Contracts tool is only available to Procore customers in the United States who have implemented the Procore for Specialty Contractors point-of-view-dictionary. See [What tool names and terms are different in Procore for general contractors, owners, and specialty contractors?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-tool-names-and-terms-are-different-in-procore-for-general-contractors-owners-and-specialty-contractors)
2 The Funding tool is only available to Procore customers in the United States who have implemented the Procore for Owners point-of-view-dictionary. See [What tool names and terms are different in Procore for general contractors, owners, and specialty contractors?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-tool-names-and-terms-are-different-in-procore-for-general-contractors-owners-and-specialty-contractors)
## See Also
  * [Approve or Reject Funding Change Orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-funding-change-orders)
  * [Approve or Reject Commitment Change Orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-commitment-change-orders)
  * [Approve or Reject Prime Contract Change Orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-prime-contract-change-orders)
title: Approve or Reject a Change Order
